description: An accordion-style definition list that displays a staff member's profile text, collapsible via the standalone-accordion pattern.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Profile accordion in its default active state with a short biography.

props.label: Profile
props.children: I am a cognitive psychologist and neuroscientist, interested in selective attention and its connections to perception, as well as expectations, working memory, and consciousness.

stories.name: WithTeachingFocus
stories.description: Profile accordion with the teachingfocus modifier class applied.

props.label: Profile
props.children:
Areas of Expertise:

  • Organisational culture and climate
  • Cross-cultural behaviour
  • Human resource management and performance

stories.name: LongBiography
stories.description: Profile accordion with a longer multi-paragraph biography.

props.label: Profile
props.children:
Kevin began his research career at Trinity College Dublin after completing an undergraduate degree in Manufacturing Engineering.

He was subsequently awarded a scholarship by the Irish Research Council for Science, Engineering and Technology to undertake a PhD.

notes: The dt element always has classes 'standalone-accordion active'. The dd element always has class 'active' with inline style 'display: block'. The root dl also always carries classes 'ckeditor-accordion used-outside-of-ckeditor' — these should be hardcoded. The 'teachingfocus' modifier appears on some instances. The dd content is rich CMS HTML passed as children ReactNode.
